# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "false"
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: baseline
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: microservices
automountServiceAccountToken: true
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payments-allow-orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payments-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: mtls-from-orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payments-allow-reports
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payments-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: mtls-from-reports
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mtls-from-orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - orders.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mtls-from-reports
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - reports.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: orders-allow-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: orders-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: mtls-from-frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mtls-from-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - frontend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: reports-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: reports
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: reports-allow-payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: reports-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: mtls-from-payments
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mtls-from-payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - payments.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
